title: echinocarpus mollis
intro: Echinocarpus mollis, also known as the New Zealand hawthorn or matipo, is a species of flowering plant in the family Anacardiaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, making it beneficial for heart health. The fruit of the Echinocarpus mollis plant is rich in antioxidants and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, digestive problems, and skin conditions. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
